patches.hypothesis: The method incorrectly assumes tag names are case insensitive. It incorrectly identifies and matches end tags based on lowercase tag names instead of preserving the original case.
patches.changes:
- use t.asEndTag().name() instead of t.asEndTag().normalName()
- check tag names preserving their case sensitivity
patches.diff:
- use t.asEndTag().name() instead of t.asEndTag().normalName()
- check tag names preserving their case sensitivity
